disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive weakening, narrowing and splaying of the urinary stream over about six months
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about how your urine stream has changed.
How long has the flow been weak?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Over the last six months it's gone from normal to weak, thin and sprayed all over the place — and tonight it's just a trickle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Straining with abdominal effort to void, sense of incomplete emptying, and post-void dribbling
trigger_question_examples: Do you have to strain or push to pass urine?
Do you feel like your bladder empties fully?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I have to push really hard with my stomach muscles to get anything out, it never feels empty afterwards, and I dribble for a while once I'm done.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Constant dull lower abdominal / suprapubic aching with pelvic pressure
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel pressure low in your belly?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a constant dull ache and pressure low down in my stomach that won't go away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: History of difficult, traumatic urethral catheterisation during a hospital operation about five years ago
trigger_question_examples: Have you ever had a catheter or any instrument passed into your waterpipe?
Any past operations or procedures involving your bladder or urethra?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, five years ago during an operation they struggled to get a catheter in — it was really rough and painful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Whether the patient can still pass any urine at all, versus a complete inability to void
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass at least some urine, or has it stopped completely?
When did you last manage to pass any urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can still squeeze out a few drops if I strain — it hasn't stopped completely, but it's close.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Absence of fever, rigors or visible blood in the urine
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, shivering or feeling hot and cold?
Have you seen any blood in your urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or shivering, and I haven't noticed any blood in what little I pass.
